## Summary

- Briefly describe intent and expected outcome.

## Changes

- List key edits by behavior (not just file names).
- Include changed skill path(s) when applicable.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run skills:validate`
- [ ] Skill-specific regression tests (if behavior logic changed)
- [ ] Docs updated if needed

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is minimal and focused
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data added
- [ ] Naming/structure follows `DEVELOPMENT.md`
